description: Two-phase switched-capacitor low-pass filter: PMOS switches (5000/30) toggle C_fly=1nF between VIN and C_hold=10nF, clocked by ideal vsources at f_clk=1kHz. R_eq=1/(f_clk*C_fly)=1MOhm, f_c=1/(2*pi*R_eq*C_hold)~15.9Hz. Single-ended LPTV; the second periodic calibration case beside the AFE chopper. Exercises the reverse-biased switch / signed-current path and the cyclostationary-flicker folding (the SC-LPF runaway + noise over-count were both fixed 2026-06-22).
provenance_note: Spectre 24.1.0.078 on flex (daraina.ele.tue.nl), 2026-06-21. pss fund=1k harms=20 tstab=50m + pac sideband-0 (pac.0.pac, VIN->VOUT) + pnoise(VOUT). Netlist generated faithful to examples/sc_lpf.py incl. ~10% clock conduction overlap. pss.td.pss kept for the steady-state VOUT level.
